Assessing The Competitive
Landscape Is All About
Understanding What Is
Currently Being 	Offered 	To
Prospects In Your Marketplace
Module 1 - Lesson 3
Assessing 	The Competitive Landscape:

-- 1 of 4 --

In Order For Importance:!
• List!
• Offer!
• Copy
Module 1 - Lesson 3
Assessing 	The Competitive Landscape:

-- 2 of 4 --

Offer Elements:!
• What is the product/service positioning?!
• What are the deliverables?!
• What is the price-point?!
• What are the payment terms?!
• What are the payment options?!
• What are the premiums/bonuses?!
• What is the guarantee (risk-reversal)?
Module 1 - Lesson 3
Assessing 	The Competitive Landscape:

-- 3 of 4 --

Module 1 - Lesson 3
Assessing 	The Competitive Landscape:
Your Goal Is To Create An
Offer 	That Is 	Far Superior 	To
What Is Currently Being
Offered By Competitors!

-- 4 of 4 --
